name: oh-my-gjc
description: oh-my-gajaecode — one plugin, everything. A single install brings 15 capabilities, all surfaced natively as /omg:* commands and trigger-word skills: easy-answer (plain-language final answers), gate-briefing (domain-blind approval-gate briefings), multivendor model presets (ideal / escalate-surgical / monorepo / reviewer), extragoal (external fresh-context cross-family final review gate), branch-flow (per-repo dev/main git discipline in the repo's AGENTS.md + docs/WORKFLOW.md), worktree (parallel-session git worktree new/list/clean via /omg:worktree), session toggles + always-on semaphores (~/.gjc/agent/SYSTEM.md marker blocks), /omg:fable (Fable 5 adversarial safety audit), /omg:codex-ask + /omg:codex-run (local Codex CLI read-only ask / file-writing deepwork), /omg:lazycodex-setup + /omg:lazycodex-work (LazyCodex harness + ultrawork), /omg:codex-app-launch + /omg:codex-app-ask (Codex desktop App over CDP), /omg:insane-review (GPT-5.5 Pro web review), /omg:bugwatch-scan (gjc bug collector), /omg:tower-setup (control-tower fleet orchestration), and /omg:setup for optional model-preset merge + always-on toggles. Prerequisite-gated capabilities self-diagnose at first run; install stays light, and /omg:gajae-app (install/update/run the self-hosted Gajae Code web app — gjc session viewer + external CLI terminal; app source lives in devswha/claudecodeui).
